events.text: Goal!  England 1, Senegal 0. Jordan Henderson (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Jude Bellingham.
Goal!  England 2, Senegal 0. Harry Kane (England) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Phil Foden   following a fast break.
Goal!  England 3, Senegal 0. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Phil Foden.
Kalidou Koulibaly (Senegal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
